title: Five Country Ministerial 2025: communiqué and statement
body: "The home affairs, interior and security ministers of Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the UK and the USA met in London on 8 to 9 September 2025.  The communiqué summarises how they will work together on:   border security preventing child sexual exploitation and abuse counter-terrorism countering foreign interference   The statement sets out principles for removing people with no legal basis to remain in the country. "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
